Lactate Dehydrogenase (LDH) Isoenzymes Test 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/lactate-dehydrogenase-ldh-isoenzymes-test/ 
Lactate Dehydrogenase (LDH) Isoenzymes Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a lactate dehydrogenase (LDH) isoenzymes test? 
This test measures lactate dehydrogenase (LDH) isoenzymes in a sample of your blood. It's a general test that can help find out if you have tissue damage from disease or injury. It can also help show which organs and other tis
